nasb.text: The chief jailer committed to Joseph’s charge all the prisoners who were in the jail; so that whatever was done there, he was responsible for it.

esv.text: And the keeper of the prison put Joseph in charge of all the prisoners who were in the prison. Whatever was done there, he was the one who did it.

cnv.text: 因此，監獄長把監裡所有的囚犯都交在約瑟手裡；他們在那裡所作的一切事務，都由約瑟負責處理。

ccb.text: 监狱长把狱中所有囚犯及一切事务都交给约瑟管理。

csbs.text: 监狱长就把监狱里所有的囚犯都交在约瑟手下；狱中要办的一切事，都由约瑟处理。
